Memory allocation and deallocation routines for various ECMA data types.

# Purpose
The code is a C header file that declares functions for memory allocation and deallocation for various ECMAScript (ECMA) data types. It provides function prototypes for allocating and freeing memory for objects such as `ecma_object_t`, `ecma_number_t`, `ecma_collection_header_t`, `ecma_collection_chunk_t`, `ecma_string_t`, `ecma_getter_setter_pointers_t`, `ecma_external_pointer_t`, `ecma_extended_object_t`, and `ecma_property_pair_t`. Each allocation function returns a pointer to the allocated memory, while each deallocation function releases the memory associated with the specified data type. This header file is part of a memory management system for ECMA data structures, ensuring efficient use of memory resources.
# Imports and Dependencies

---
- `ecma-globals.h`
